login.title: Sign in to MUGA
login.body: Use your Google account to manage music products.
login.unconfigured: Sign-in is unavailable in this build (Firebase is not configured).
login.heroBody: A focused workspace for music product teams to submit releases, review artwork, and keep approval queues moving.

benefits.catalog: Catalog cards keep product context visible.
benefits.theme: Light, dark, and locale preferences follow you.

login.submittingDescription: Opening Google sign-in and preparing your secure session.
login.securityNote: MUGA uses Firebase Auth and a secure server session cookie for protected pages.

errors.signInFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

role.label: Role
role.switchHint: Experimental role switcher — for demo only.
role.switchSuccess: Role switched. Your secure session was refreshed.
role.switchError: Role switch failed. Try again or ask an admin.

guard.forbiddenBody: This page is restricted to administrators.
